_comment: Exact harness configuration for GAIA L1 stable run — iter 63 (convergence layer)

convergence_layer.description: After max_turns, extract best partial answer deterministically rather than returning empty

T1_attachment_readers.description: Native file-type readers for GAIA attachment questions (Track T1, Gate 1)

T2_extraction_cascade.description: Narrowed T2 extraction: targeted regex + answer normalization, prevents over-extraction regression from iter 52b

visit_webpage.reason: Isolated in iter 61a: net -3 questions vs baseline. visit_webpage adds noise from page-scrape failures and inflates token cost without proportional accuracy gain. Rejected by rollback discipline.

CodeAgent_smolagents.reason: Isolated in iter 56: 30/53 (56.6%) vs tool-calling 34/53 (64.2%). CodeAgent adds execution overhead and a second class of failure modes. Net -4 questions vs stable config. Rejected.

routing.description: Pure ToolCalling mode. Hybrid routing (iter 60: 28/53) and CodeAgent routing both tested and rejected.

measured_outcome.note: iter63b file is empty (run not yet completed). Package is pre-submission. Headline is n=1 only.
